name: Party Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Dried chives or 1 tablespoon snipped chives
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine sour cream and softened cream cheese.
2. Stir in the dried chives or snipped chives, fresh chives, garlic powder, and butter until well mixed.
3. Spoon the mixture over the mashed potatoes.
4. Sprinkle bread crumbs evenly over the top of the casserole.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 50-60 minutes.
6. Top with shredded cheddar cheese just before serving.
7. Dish can be assembled a day ahead and baked just before serving.
Serves: 10
